visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white cardigan over a lace top and a pleated brown skirt, stands in a brightly lit retail environment. Behind her are glass-door freezers filled with frozen seafood packages. She holds a large red bag of Kirkland Signature Wild Argentine Red Shrimp, presenting it to the camera with a smiling, neutral expression. A prominent red and blue 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is overlaid at the top. (2) The camera moves to a close-up of the product bag. The woman places her hand flat against the clear plastic window of the packaging to provide a scale comparison for the size of the frozen shrimp. Yellow and blue graphic text overlays appear surrounding the bag to emphasize the size. (3) The shot returns to a medium framing of the woman as she continues to hold the bag and point at specific details on the label, such as the weight and price. She gestures with her free hand while speaking. The background remains the frozen food aisle of a large warehouse store with industrial shelving. (4) The scene transitions to a kitchen setting with warm lighting. A top-down shot shows a black frying pan on a gas stove. Several peeled, pinkish shrimp are being sautéed along with several whole garlic cloves. The pan is lifted and shaken, demonstrating the cooking process and the texture of the shrimp. A blue text bar appears at the top of the frame.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 最新款. [Slogan]: 野生阿根廷特大紅蝦仁. (2) [Subtitle]: 哇哦 那麼大. [Variety]: 那麼大. (3) [Subtitle]: 哇 它這個快908公克. (4) [Subtitle]: 快一公斤哎. (5) [Subtitle]: 價格是825塊錢. (6) [Subtitle]: 825 嗯 而且. (7) [Subtitle]: 來自阿根廷. (8) [Subtitle]: 可以煎跟烤. (9) [Subtitle]: 我們回去看看好吃不好吃. (10) [Subtitle]: 它還去頭去殼. (11) [Subtitle]: 所以這些重量. (12) [Subtitle]: 都是無頭無殼. (13) [Subtitle]: 來吃吃看 阿根廷跟之前賣的有區別. (14) [Variety]: 請看下集食用心得.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator presenting the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair, wearing a white lace-trimmed cardigan and a brown pleated skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco warehouse freezer section with industrial glass doors and stacked seafood products; later, a domestic kitchen with a black stovetop and frying pan.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a bright, high-pitched female voice delivering a high-energy introduction. An upbeat, medium-tempo electronic BGM with a strong percussive beat plays continuously in the background. (2) A sharp rustling sound occurs as the speaker handles a plastic bag, accompanied by an enthusiastic vocal exclamation. The speech rate is fast and the tone is inviting. (3) The female narrator provides logistical details about the product's weight and price. Her delivery is consistent with professional vlogging styles, featuring clear articulation and varied pitch contours. The BGM remains steady. (4) A loud, continuous sizzling sound of frying food takes over the mid-to-high frequency range, indicating a shift to a cooking scene. The metallic clink of a pan being moved is audible, followed by a playful meme-style SFX. The BGM concludes the segment with a rhythmic flourish.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a new giant red shrimp product available at Costco, highlighting its significant size, cost-effectiveness, and ease of preparation through a quick sautéing demonstration.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly highlights the Kirkland Signature (Costco house brand) shrimp, showing the packaging, logo, and price specifically at the warehouse store.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-density information delivery typical of social media product recommendations, effectively using visual scale comparisons.
